ns1:revision.ns1:text:
=== Mailing Lists ===
General * [http://lists.lustre.org/listinfo.cgi/lustre-announce-lustre.org lustre-announce] A low traffic announcements-only mailing list. Keep up to date with the latest Lustre news and events. ** [http://lists.lustre.org/pipermail/lustre-announce-lustre.org/ lustre-announce archives] * [http://lists.lustre.org/listinfo.cgi/lustre-discuss-lustre.org lustre-discuss] The main mailing list for Lustre users and administrators. Discuss all aspects of designing, installing, configuring, using, and maintaining a Lustre filesystem. ** [http://lists.lustre.org/pipermail/lustre-discuss-lustre.org/ lustre-discuss archives] * [http://lists.lustre.org/listinfo.cgi/lustre-devel-lustre.org lustre-devel] The primary mailing list for discussing Lustre software development. ** [http://lists.lustre.org/pipermail/lustre-devel-lustre.org/ lustre-devel archives]
Working Groups * [http://lists.opensfs.org/listinfo.cgi/lwg-opensfs.org lwg] The [http://wiki.opensfs.org/Lustre_Working_Group OpenSFS Lustre Working Group] (LWG) is the place the where the participants of OpenSFS come together to coordinate their software development efforts for the Lustre high-performance, Open Source, parallel filesystem. * [http://lists.opensfs.org/listinfo.cgi/dwg-opensfs.org dwg] The [https://wiki.opensfs.org/Documentation_Working_Group OpenSFS Documentation Working Group] (DWG) allows collaboration to improve the [https://doc.lustre.org/lustre_manual.xhtml Lustre Operations Manual] and other Lustre-related documentation (this wiki, man pages, etc.) to help new and experienced Lustre users find the information they need. * [http://lists.opensfs.org/listinfo.cgi/lustre.org-opensfs.org lustre-org] The [http://wiki.lustre.org/Lustre.org_Working_Group Lustre.org Working Group] (LOWG) manages the lustre.org web domain and its associated content.
=== Slack ===
Linux Lustre Client Slack channel * Drop by and say hello, and talk about Lustre development. * [https://join.slack.com/t/lustreupstreamclient/shared_invite/zt-23pl0xxsi-1PwfkpjP_vphW8nqoUnUBA Link to joining the Slack channel]
[[Category:Communication]] [[Category:Development]]
